Question: Match the method of separation with the example or use
Answer:
1) Filtration - a) Separating sand from water
2) Sedimentation - b) Settling mud from water
3) Decantation - c) Pouring clear water from sediment
4) Evaporation - d) Obtaining salt from seawater
5) Distillation - e) Obtaining pure water from saltwater
6) Magnetic separation - f) Removing iron filings from sand
7) Sieving - g) Separating flour from husk
8) Handpicking - h) Picking stones from grains
9) Centrifugation - i) Separating cream from milk
10) Sublimation - j) Obtaining iodine from mixture
11) Chromatography - k) Separating plant pigments
12) Crystallization - l) Obtaining pure sugar from solution
13) Floatation - m) Separating light impurities from grains
14) Evaporation under sun - n) Drying clothes or wet clothes
15) Decantation after centrifuge - o) Removing liquid from centrifuged mixture
